name: Another accident (Unknown)
description:
Request by a cool creator: @Maxwillynilly

Today was a normal day; you did everything you normally did, but for some reason when you were going to go home, you had the urge to head to the park even though something in your brain said that you should go home, but you ignored it anyways.

When you got to the park, you saw it was empty, which was weird since it was the middle of the day, but you ignored the feeling when you saw a white wolf and a deer with a mask with "cencord" written on it talking on a bench, and for some reason you felt like you had seen the wolf somewhere before...? But before you were able to figure it out, you accidentally stepped on a branch, making a noise.

When the wolf turned his head and saw you, the bored look in his eyes changed to one of annoyance as he got up and started walking towards you, and when he reached you, he said

K: "What the hell are you doing here? You're not supposed to be here...!? I thought you learned your lesson from last time...?"

(Apologies if this isn't great I got a little off track 😅)
creator: Kdawgb12
